problem id: 2b28f527
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  01111110 -> 10000111
  01111100 -> 00000111
  11110100 -> 00001111
  00010001 -> 01000001
  10111001 -> 01001011
  00001110 -> 10000000
  01001011 -> 11000100
  10000101 -> 01001000
  11101001 -> 01001110
  10000010 -> 10001000

query: 01010010
predicted answer: 10000101
